hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Finished residential kitchen remodel with new cabinetry, quartz countertops, and modern fixtures in a metro Atlanta suburban home, professional contractor standing confidently in the space, photorealistic, no text or logos, no signage, warm natural daylight.
hero.caption_context: Remodeling is outcome-led — hero should be a finished space, not a tools-on-the-job action shot. Kitchen or bath remodel (highest-ticket categories) reinforces scope. Include owner/contractor in frame if available to reinforce 'real local crew' vs marketplace-mill.

gallery.context: Kitchen before/after or finished kitchen with cabinets + counters. Caption 'Kitchen remodels — cabinets, counters, full-room'.
Bathroom remodel — tile, vanity, shower. Caption 'Bathrooms — tile, vanity, shower, full-remodel'.
Hardwood or LVP install in progress or finished. Caption 'Flooring — hardwood, LVP, tile'.
Drywall finish or interior paint — punch-list or full-wall. Caption 'Drywall + paint — repair, finish, full-room'.
Handyman punch-list work — fixture install, trim, small repairs. Caption 'Handyman + punch-list — one call, one crew'.
Owner or crew on a real job site. Caption names owner if surfaced — reinforces local-operator brand.

sections.context: Chamblee / Brookhaven / Doraville / Dunwoody residential streetscape; Unsplash OK if no real photos

notes: Remodeling vertical — outcome-led photography (finished spaces) not process-led (tools). Slightly higher contrast (1.08) than plumbing/HVAC to make before/after transformations pop. Kitchen + bath get 2 of 6 slots (highest-ticket categories). At least 1 slot for handyman/punch-list to communicate 'full scope' not just remodel-only.
